title: I Will Teach You to Be Rich
author: Ramit Sethi
core_idea: A rich life isn’t about deprivation — it’s about intentional design and automation. Sethi teaches a modern, guilt-free, and practical system to manage money through automation and conscious spending.
key_concepts: Money should serve your life, not restrict it.
Automate savings, investing, and bill payments.
Conscious spending allows you to enjoy guilt-free purchases.
Start investing early, even with small amounts.
High fees silently destroy long-term returns.
six_week_program: Week 2: Switch to no-fee checking and savings accounts.
Week 3: Open and fund a 401(k) and Roth IRA.
Week 4: Automate bill payments, savings, and investments.
Week 5: Start investing in low-cost index funds.
Week 6: Create your Conscious Spending Plan.
notable_quote: A Rich Life is lived outside the spreadsheet.
practical_lessons: Spend extravagantly on what you love and cut mercilessly on what you don’t.
Start today — small consistent action beats waiting for perfection.
